items.headline: Taste of Chicago returns to Grant Park July 8-12
items.summary: The 46th annual Taste of Chicago is running five days this year instead of the usual long weekend, with dozens of local restaurants and free nightly concerts headlined by Common, Babyface, Beach Bunny, and Julieta Venegas.

items.headline: Sanders BBQ Supply Co. is expanding from Beverly to Hyde Park
items.summary: After winning Best Counter Service at the local Banchet Awards and landing a James Beard semifinalist nod, chef James Sanders is opening a sit-down barbecue and steak spot at 5311 S. Lake Park Ave. in Hyde Park this July.

items.headline: Southport Art Fest takes over Lakeview July 11-12
items.summary: More than 100 local and national artists set up along the Southport Corridor for the weekend, with live entertainment throughout one of the North Side's most walkable strips.

items.headline: CPS confirms August 24 start date for 2026-27 school year
items.summary: Chicago Public Schools' family calendar is finalized for the coming year, with winter break running December 21 through January 4. The district is also facing a budget shortfall that could affect staffing and programs at some schools.

items.headline: Bears move forward with Hammond, Indiana stadium plan
items.summary: After years of negotiations over the former Arlington Park racetrack site, the Chicago Bears' board voted in June to build their new stadium in Hammond, Indiana instead, leaving the 326-acre Arlington Heights property's future undecided again.
